ecc.note: agents/*.md carry local `effort:` frontmatter per ADR 0009 (per-agent reasoning-effort cost tiers). Upstream ECC has no such lines, so an effort-line diff vs upstream is permanent local policy — NEVER sync a removal. tests/test-agent-effort-tiers.sh enforces presence.

gstack.note: Patterns distilled into skills/supplements/, NOT verbatim file syncs. Provenance ledger: skills/supplements/MANIFEST.md (Source column). Not pulled by sync-upstream.sh — no file-level entries (the supplements are prose rewrites of multi-file skill patterns and would generate false semantic-drift diffs). Distilled 2026-03-23/24 from gstack /office-hours, /cso, /qa, /design-consultation, /freeze; re-audited against v1.58.5.0 (2026-07-06).

local fix for CodeQL double-unescape (#219); unfixed upstream as of 2026-06-27

PR #276 vault adaptation: name marketing-ads (not ads) + tools/ links absolute-ized to upstream GitHub (vault has no local tools/ dir). Body synced to upstream v2.1.0 (Andromeda Meta playbook, creative-first reframe).
PR #276 vault adaptation: skill_name marketing-ads (not ads). Otherwise synced to upstream.

upstream 4130457 shipped an incomplete _ecc_→_clv2_ rename: start-observer.sh:40 still called the removed _ecc_resolve_homunculus_dir (undefined → empty CONFIG_DIR). Fixed locally to _clv2_resolve_homunculus_dir; report upstream.

adds _ValidatingRedirectHandler (SSRF-via-redirect defense: re-validates every redirect hop against the denylist) which upstream lacks; otherwise reconciled to upstream 4130457 (shared _registry_lock, registry healing/created_at, #2297 traversal guard). Report SSRF gap upstream.

busdriver frontmatter adaptation (name: diagnose, richer trigger description, # Diagnose title) for busdriver:diagnose routing; body refreshed from upstream diagnosing-bugs (mattpocock rename of engineering/diagnose).

Quoted the frontmatter description (double-quote wrap) — upstream ships it unquoted, but as a LIVE-promoted skill the unquoted description contains ": " (e.g. "Two actions:") which strict YAML rejects (mapping values not allowed), so the live skill fails to load. Only divergence from ecc upstream @4130457.

Vault rename supabase→supabase-router: the bare name `supabase` collides with ubiquitous Supabase-library tokens (supabase.rpc, supabase.com, supabase functions) across active skills, tripping the vault-references contract test. Only the frontmatter name line diverges from upstream; body synced.
